title: Conduct intertidal marine monitoring
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct intertidal marine monitoring demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
